title: Jones Lang LaSalle is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Jones Lang LaSalle is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
